General.Name: Trendzon Holdings Group Ltd
General.Description: Pengo Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides infrastructural pipeline construction and related engineering services for gas, water, telecommunications, and power industries in Singapore and the People's Republic of China. It operates in two segments, Construction Contracts and Engineering Services, and Trading of Building Materials. The company also engages in the money lending business; and provides engineering management and development consultation services, as well as offers infrastructural water and electricity pipeline construction and related engineering services. It serves government agencies and private companies. The company was formerly known as Trendzon Holdings Group Limited and changed its name to Pengo Holdings Group Limited in April 2025. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Mai Tak Industrial Building, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
